label: Rule Brittleness Trap
description: Overly specific rules break on edge cases. The world only works for the exact scenarios the builder tested.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Rule specificity exceeds 80% — rules are extremely narrow.
causal_translation.rule_text: Overly specific rules are brittle. They work perfectly for the builder's test cases but break on any novel input.
causal_translation.shift_text: The world becomes fragile. It works in demos but fails in real use.
causal_translation.effect_text: World integrity reduced by 30%. Rules are brittle.
